is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +01:00. In [ISO 8601](/wiki/ISO_8601 "ISO 8601"), the associated time would be written as 2019-02-07T23:28:34+01:00. It indicates a point of time meaning [Greenwich Mean Time](/wiki/Greenwich_Mean_Time "Greenwich Mean Time") (GMT) plus one hour. It is synonym with [Central European Time](/wiki/Central_European_Time "Central European Time") (CET).

| Blue | [Greenwich Mean Time](/wiki/Greenwich_Mean_Time "Greenwich Mean Time") ([UTC](/wiki/UTC%2B00:00 "UTC+00:00")) |

| [Egypt Summer Time](/wiki/Daylight_saving_time_in_Egypt "Daylight saving time in Egypt") ([UTC+3](/wiki/UTC%2B03:00 "UTC+03:00")) |
| Green | [East Africa Time](/wiki/East_Africa_Time "East Africa Time") ([UTC+3](/wiki/UTC%2B03:00 "UTC+03:00")) |
| Turquoise | * [Mauritius Time](/wiki/Mauritius_Time "Mauritius Time")[[d]](#endnote_template_footnote_d) * [Seychelles Time](/wiki/Seychelles_Time "Seychelles Time")[[d]](#endnote_template_footnote_d) ([UTC+4](/wiki/UTC%2B04:00 "UTC+04:00")) |

 [**a**](#ref_template_footnote_aa) The islands of [Cape Verde](/wiki/Cape_Verde "Cape Verde") lie west of the African mainland.  
 [**b**](#ref_template_footnote_bb) During [Ramadan](/wiki/Ramadan "Ramadan"), Morocco switches to [Greenwich Mean Time](/wiki/Greenwich_Mean_Time "Greenwich Mean Time") ([UTC](/wiki/UTC%2B00:00 "UTC+00:00")) and returns to UTC+1 after it ends.  
 [**d**](#ref_template_footnote_dd) [Mauritius](/wiki/Mauritius "Mauritius") and the [Seychelles](/wiki/Seychelles "Seychelles") lie to the east and northeast of [Madagascar](/wiki/Madagascar "Madagascar"), respectively.

**UTC+01:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +01:00. In [ISO 8601](/wiki/ISO_8601 "ISO 8601"), the associated time would be written as 2019-02-07T23:28:34+01:00. It indicates a point of time meaning [Greenwich Mean Time](/wiki/Greenwich_Mean_Time "Greenwich Mean Time") (GMT) plus one hour. It is synonym with [Central European Time](/wiki/Central_European_Time "Central European Time") (CET).

This time is used in:

* [Central European Time](/wiki/Central_European_Time "Central European Time")
* [West Africa Time](/wiki/West_Africa_Time "West Africa Time")
* [Western European Summer Time](/wiki/Western_European_Summer_Time "Western European Summer Time")
  + [British Summer Time](/wiki/British_Summer_Time "British Summer Time")
  + [Irish Standard Time](/wiki/Time_in_the_Republic_of_Ireland "Time in the Republic of Ireland")

## Discrepancies between official UTC+01:00 and geographical UTC+01:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Discrepancies between official UTC+01:00 and geographical UTC+01:00")]

### Areas in UTC+01:00 longitudes using UTC+02:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Areas in UTC+01:00 longitudes using UTC+02:00")]

From south to north:

* South Africa
  + The westernmost part, including [Cape Town](/wiki/Cape_Town "Cape Town")
* Botswana
  + The western part of the districts:
    - [Kgalagadi](/wiki/Kgalagadi_District "Kgalagadi District")
    - [Ghanzi](/wiki/Ghanzi_District "Ghanzi District")
    - [Ngamiland](/wiki/North-West_District_(Botswana) "North-West District (Botswana)")
* Democratic Republic of the Congo
  + The very westernmost part of [Lualaba Province](/wiki/Lualaba_Province "Lualaba Province"), [Kasaï-Central](/wiki/Kasa%C3%AF-Central "Kasaï-Central") and [Sankuru](/wiki/Sankuru "Sankuru")
* Libya
  + The most part in the country, including nation's capital [Tripoli](/wiki/Tripoli,_Libya "Tripoli, Libya")
* Greece (standard time)
  + The western part, including [Patras](/wiki/Patras "Patras") and [Ioanina](/wiki/Ioannina "Ioannina")
* Romania (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Timișoara](/wiki/Timi%C8%99oara "Timișoara")
* Russia
  + [Kaliningrad Oblast](/wiki/Kaliningrad_Oblast "Kaliningrad Oblast")
* Lithuania (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Klaipėda](/wiki/Klaip%C4%97da "Klaipėda")
* Latvia (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Liepāja](/wiki/Liep%C4%81ja "Liepāja")
* Estonia (standard time)
  + The westernmost parts of the [Saare](/wiki/Saare_County "Saare County") and [Hiiu](/wiki/Hiiu_County "Hiiu County") counties
* Finland (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Turku](/wiki/Turku "Turku")

### Areas outside UTC+01:00 longitudes using UTC+01:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+01:00 longitudes using UTC+01:00 time")]

#### Areas between meridians 7°30'W and 7°30'E ("physical" UTC+00:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Areas between meridians 7°30'W and 7°30'E (\"physical\" UTC+00:00)")]

All of:

* Andorra
* Belgium
* Gibraltar
* Luxembourg
* Monaco
* Netherlands
* Benin

Most of:

* Spain, excluding Canary Islands (which use UTC) and westernmost part of the mainland (see below)
* France (with exception of small parts of [Alsace](/wiki/Alsace "Alsace"), [Lorraine](/wiki/Lorraine_(region) "Lorraine (region)") and [Provence](/wiki/Provence "Provence") are east of 7°30'E)
* Algeria, including [Algiers](/wiki/Algiers "Algiers")

Parts of:

* Equatorial Guinea ([Annobón](/wiki/Annob%C3%B3n "Annobón") Island only)
* Morocco (northeastern part)
* Niger (western part)
* Nigeria (western part)
* Germany (The very westernmost part)
* Switzerland (westernmost part)
* Italy (The very northwesternmost part)
* Norway ([Bouvet Island](/wiki/Bouvet_Island "Bouvet Island") and southwesternmost part)

#### Areas between meridians 22°30'W and 7°30'W ("physical" UTC−01:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Areas between meridians 22°30'W and 7°30'W (\"physical\" UTC−01:00)")]

* Spain
  + Parts of Galicia, Extremadura and Andalusia
* Norway
  + Jan Mayen
* Morocco
  + Southwestern part, including [Casablanca](/wiki/Casablanca "Casablanca")
* Western Sahara
  + Most part in the territory (occupied by Morocco, excluding claimed by [Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic](/wiki/Sahrawi_Arab_Democratic_Republic "Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic") which use UTC+00:00)

## Notes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B01:00&action=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Notes")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-2)** Despite being on the Southern Hemisphere, Bouvet Island uses Northern Hemisphere daylight saving time.
